nasb.text: Now after this it came about that David defeated the Philistines and subdued them; and David took control of the chief city from the hand of the Philistines.

esv.text: After this David defeated the Philistines and subdued them, and David took Metheg-ammah out of the hand of the Philistines.

cnv.text: 這事以後，大衛攻打非利士人，制伏了他們。大衛從非利士人手中取得了京城的控制權。

ccb.text: 后来大卫打败并征服了非利士人，夺取了他们的都城。
